infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aegis uses the microphone to classify environmental sounds into haptic alerts. No audio is ever recorded, uploaded, or stored — only classification results are saved locally.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Aegis uses your location to pause alerts in Safe Zones you define.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Aegis uses background location to monitor Safe Zones while armed, so alerts are paused in familiar locations.

plugins.microphonePermission: Aegis uses the microphone to detect emergency sounds, dog barks, and your name — so you stay aware of your environment. No audio is ever recorded or uploaded.
